blurb: FileVault provides full-volume encryption for macOS using XTS-AES-128 with a 256-bit key applied to the entire startup volume including user data and system files. On Macs with Apple silicon, the Secure Enclave manages FileVault keys, providing hardware-rooted protection analogous to iOS Data Protection; the SSD controller performs real-time encryption with no performance penalty. Recovery options include an iCloud-escrowed recovery key, a personal recovery key generated at setup, or an institutional recovery key managed via MDM. Instant wipe is achieved by discarding the volume encryption key, rendering all data cryptographically inaccessible.
